data.name: Security Guard Sex - Episode 6
data.detailed_description:
A visual novel series with animations about a guy working as a security guard. In this episode, he is assigned to a county jail, where he catches two attractive women comforting each other after a night spent behind bars.

GAME DESCRIPTION

Trixie and Cheryl, two attractive women, find themselves together in a county jail for the night.
After hours of silence, their need for a comforting touch brings them closer.
Their intimate moment is abruptly interrupted when Officer Jeff, newly promoted and on duty, catches them in the act.
Jeff, having to enforce the rules, takes Trixie to his office for a private discussion.
Meanwhile, Cheryl, left alone, decides to take care of her own needs while she waits.
Would Jeff suggest cooperating with him could lead to a better outcome for both of them?
Play our game to find out!

FEATURES

- HD renders and animations
- Video and image gallery

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
